content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Z function". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
constraints: s consists of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The input will contain a string s of length n.
content.outputFormat: The output will be an array of length n, where the i-th element is the length of the longest substring starting at i that matches a prefix of s.

solution.approach: The Z-function can be computed using a single pass through the string, maintaining a sliding window of previously computed values.
